title: diyshon #1788
definition:
1) a clean animal,
    1a) pygarg, a kind of antelope or gazelle
    1b) perhaps mountain goat
    1c) perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a clean animal,
    1a) pygarg, a kind of antelope or gazelle
    1b) perhaps mountain goat
    1c) perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

    NASB:  mountain goat (a cermonially clean animal)
